name: MediaApiStandaloneLocalhost
displayName: Media API — Standalone external app (localhost dev)
description: Dev convenience: the MediaApiStandalone configuration with localhost origins baked in (app at http://localhost:5173 — the pinned Vite dev port — against an Orchard tenant at https://localhost:5001). Apply MediaApiPkce FIRST, then run this. It enables OrchardCore.Cors with a default policy allowing http://localhost:5173 (bearer, so AllowCredentials=false), registers the app-origin callback URIs on the 'media_gallery' client, and reloads the tenant so the CORS policy takes effect immediately. Do not use in production — apply MediaApiStandalone (with your real origins) instead.
author: The Orchard Core Team
